## 🎯 Major Discoveries

### 1. Page 54 is the Master Template

**Finding:** Page 54 (Heritage House - Comparable 1) uses the correct 2-column layout pattern that should be applied to ALL comparable property pages (54-58).

**Template Structure:**
- **Left Column:** Tables (Sale Information, Property Details, Income Analysis, Unit Mix)
- **Right Column:** Property photo, location map, address block, remarks
- **CSS:** Ultra-compact spacing (7-8pt font, 2-4px padding)
- **Design:** Optimized to fit all content on one page without overflow

### 2. SVG Comparison Revealed Mismatches

**Method:** Comparing same page numbers between North Battleford and Binscarth SVG files to identify dynamic vs static content.

**Pages Requiring Restructure:**
- **Page 52:** "Presentation" intro page (text only) - PENDING
- **Page 53:** Map page showing all 5 comparable locations - PENDING
- **Page 55:** Comparable 2 (College View) - use Page 54 template - PENDING
- **Page 56:** Comparable 3 (Woodland Estates) - use Page 54 template - PENDING
- **Page 57:** Comparable 4 - use Page 54 template - PENDING
- **Page 58:** Comparable 5 (Parkside Flats 2) - use Page 54 template - PENDING
  - **Note:** Content currently misplaced on Page 53!
- **Page 59:** Multi-column valuation table - REVIEW AFTER 52-58

### 3. Templates & Guides Organization

**Templates Created:**
1. `template-comparable-page.html` - For Pages 54-58 (comparable properties)
2. `template-map-page.html` - For Page 53 and any other map pages

**Guides Created:**
1. `GUIDE-Template-Usage.md` - Template application workflow, overflow fixes, browser cache solutions, CSS scoping

## 🤝 Decisions Made

### Template Organization
- **Decision:** Store reusable page templates and guides in dedicated folder
- **Reason:** Templates were initially created in /tmp/, but should be in project structure for version control and discoverability
- **Action:** Move templates and guides to `1-Formatting & Report/Templates & Guides/`
- **User Contribution:** User moved AGENT-GUIDE-Page-Formatting.md into folder and renamed to "Templates & Guides"

### Execution Strategy
- **Decision:** Sequential page fixes (52→53→55→56→57→58→59)
- **Reason:** Each page depends on understanding the previous page's pattern
- **Agent:** Other orchestrator handling implementation while Marcel tracks progress

### Page Verification Protocol
- **Decision:** Pages 51 and earlier are verified correct, no changes needed
- **Decision:** Page 54 verified as master template, no changes needed
- **Reason:** SVG comparison confirmed these pages match design correctly

## 🐛 Problems Solved

### Problem 1: Page 55 Overflow When Toggle ON

**Symptoms:**
- Content extended past page break
- Text wrapping in Land Area field (column 2)
- Too much whitespace between columns
- Property photo missing field ID

**Root Cause:** Excessive padding, margins, and gaps throughout page

**Solution:**
- Reduced all spacing values (padding, margins, gaps)
- Fixed column widths to prevent text wrapping
- Added missing data-sample attribute to photo placeholder

**Result:** Page 55 now fits within page boundaries when toggle is ON

### Problem 2: Confusion About PREVIEW-Master.html Integrity

**Symptoms:** User thought PREVIEW-Master.html only had 3 pages (54, 55, 56)

**Root Cause:** User was viewing a different partial HTML file in browser, likely from cache

**Solution:**
- Verified PREVIEW-Master.html has all 54 pages (Pages 3-56)
- Opened correct file using `open` command
- User confirmed all pages present after hard refresh

**Result:** Confirmed master previewer intact with all pages

### Problem 3: Template & Guide Organization Strategy

**Symptoms:** Agent created templates in /tmp/ instead of project structure

**Root Cause:** No established folder for templates and guides in project

**Solution:**
- Created folder: `1-Formatting & Report/Templates & Guides/`
- Moved both templates from /tmp/
- Created GUIDE-Template-Usage.md with comprehensive documentation
- User contributed AGENT-GUIDE-Page-Formatting.md
- User renamed folder to "Templates & Guides" to reflect dual purpose

**Result:** Centralized location for all template and formatting guidance materials

## 📝 Technical Notes

### Field-Mapped Span Format
```html
<span class="field-mapped" data-sample="SAMPLE_VALUE" title="{{Field_ID}}">
  {{Field_ID}}
</span>
```

### CSS Scoping Pattern
```css
.page-sheet[data-page-num="Page XX"] .selector {
  /* Page-specific styles */
}
```

### Page 54 Template Pattern (2-Column Layout)
```html
<div class="content-wrapper">
  <!-- LEFT COLUMN: ALL TABLES -->
  <div class="left-column">
    <table class="comp-table-compact">
      <!-- Sale Information -->
    </table>
    <table class="comp-table-compact">
      <!-- Income Analysis -->
    </table>
    <table class="comp-table-compact">
      <!-- Property Details -->
    </table>
    <table class="comp-table-compact">
      <!-- Unit Mix -->
    </table>
  </div>

  <!-- RIGHT COLUMN: IMAGE + MAP + REMARKS -->
  <div class="right-column">
    <div class="property-photo">
      <span class="field-mapped" ...>{{Comp#_Photo}}</span>
    </div>
    <div class="location-map">
      <span class="field-mapped" ...>{{Comp#_Map}}</span>
    </div>
    <div class="address-block">...</div>
    <div class="remarks-block">...</div>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## 🎓 Lessons Learned

### SVG as Source of Truth
When HTML and SVG designs don't match, SVG is always correct. HTML may need restructuring to match the actual design intent.

### Template Extraction Timing
Extract templates AFTER verifying a page is correct, not before. Page 54 was verified first, then used as template source.

### Browser Cache Management
When previewing HTML changes, always hard refresh (Cmd+Shift+R) to avoid seeing cached versions.

### Todo List as Communication
In dual orchestrator setup, shared todo list is essential for tracking progress and maintaining coordination.
